title: Noncomplying contracts void
doc_html:
§1559.  Noncomplying contracts void

Any contract for dance studio lessons and other services which does not comply with the applicable provisions of this Chapter shall be void and unenforceable as contrary to public policy.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 533, §1.
